NAVAREA XIX 78/18
NORWEGIAN SEA
1.RIGLIST CORRECT AT 270630 UTC JUNE 18.NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.72-01.4N - 020-29,3E LEIV EIRIKSSON71-14,6N - 022-15,0E SONGA ENABLER67-02,7N - 006-52,7E TRANSOCEAN SPITSBERGEN65-15.4N - 006-42.3E ISLAND INNOVATOR65-10,5N - 006-50,9E SONGA ENCOURAGE
NOTES:A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METER SAFETY ZONE.B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW2.CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 61/18
